---
title: "The Rev. John Philip Anderson Morshead"
---

## The Rev. John Philip Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (<i>c</i>.1809-7 Sept 1881)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

He matriculated from Exeter Coll 1827 and from 1854 was Vicar of Salcombe Regis.  His grandmother was Elizabeth Yonge, sister of the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Cornwood, so he and his brother Captain Pentyre Anderson Morshead were cousins of the Yonges of Puslinch and of CMY.  He married (1845) his second cousin Alethea Yonge (1815-1863), eldest daughter of the Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 6th [1869]
- Letter from September 5, 1869
- Letter from Aug 4th [1863]
- Letter from July 25th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
